title: Getting accreditation or approval to hire :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Getting accreditation or approval to hire
Get information about becoming an AEWV accredited employer or being approved to hire workers through the Recognised Seasonal Employer (RSE) Scheme.
- Employer accreditation for the AEWV If you are an employer, you can apply to become accredited and hire migrants for up to 5 years by recruiting and supporting them to apply for the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV). AEWV accreditation is also needed to support people applying for seasonal AEWV visas and some resident visas.

## Employer accreditation for the AEWV
If you are an employer, you can apply to become accredited and hire migrants for up to 5 years by recruiting and supporting them to apply for the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV). AEWV accreditation is also needed to support people applying for seasonal AEWV visas and some resident visas.
- Employing workers through the Recognised Seasonal Employer scheme Horticulture or viticulture employers can recruit workers from eligible Pacific countries through the Recognised Seasonal Employer (RSE) scheme.

## Employing workers through the Recognised Seasonal Employer scheme
Horticulture or viticulture employers can recruit workers from eligible Pacific countries through the Recognised Seasonal Employer (RSE) scheme.
